expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated in the report
expectations.evidence: Report contains structured checklist of all 33 items numbered 1-33 across 4 principles (9+15+7+2), with summary showing '전체 (33항목)' and each item individually evaluated with Pass/Fail/N/A/Advisory status.

expectations.text: Semantic HTML review section is included in the report
expectations.evidence: Report includes a dedicated '시맨틱 HTML 검토' section with 7 sub-items: landmarks, section structure, interactive elements, list structure, presentational tags, form groups, and other semantic elements.

expectations.text: Found issues include filename:line references
expectations.evidence: Issues reference specific locations like 'index.html:30', 'Card.tsx:29', 'dashboard.tsx:29-31', 'Card.tsx:27', 'dashboard.tsx:46'.

expectations.text: report.html file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.html exists in outputs directory with meaningful HTML content (420 lines).

expectations.text: report.csv file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.csv exists in outputs directory with 41 rows covering all 33 KWCAG items plus 7 semantic HTML items.

expectations.text: Detected missing alt attribute on img in index.html (line 30)
expectations.evidence: Item 1 (적절한 대체 텍스트) marked as ❌ Fail with evidence: 'index.html:30 — 에 alt 속성이 없음'.

expectations.text: Detected icon buttons without aria-label in dashboard.tsx
expectations.evidence: Item 23 (레이블과 네임) marked as ❌ Fail: 'dashboard.tsx:29-31 — 첫 번째 아이콘 버튼에 aria-label 없음. dashboard.tsx:34-36 — 두 번째 아이콘 버튼에도 aria-label 없음.'

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id=card-item issue in Card.tsx
expectations.evidence: Item 32 (마크업 오류 방지) marked as ❌ Fail: 'Card.tsx:27 — id="card-item"이 하드코딩되어 있어, 리스트에서 Card 컴포넌트를 여러 번 렌더링하면 동일 ID가 중복됨'.

expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated in the report
expectations.evidence: Report does NOT have a structured 33-item KWCAG2.2 checklist. Instead it lists 20 ad-hoc issues (A01-A20) organized by file, not by the standard 33 KWCAG items. No systematic pass/fail evaluation of all 33 items.

expectations.text: Semantic HTML review section is included in the report
expectations.evidence: No dedicated semantic HTML review section. The report focuses on accessibility issues but does not have a separate semantic HTML analysis section.

expectations.text: Found issues include filename:line references
expectations.evidence: Issues include file and line references: 'index.html line 2', 'index.html line 30', 'Card.tsx line 29', 'dashboard.tsx lines 29-31', etc.

expectations.text: report.html file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.html exists with meaningful content (337 lines), structured with file-based issue tables.

expectations.text: report.csv file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.csv exists with 21 rows of issue data including ID, File, Line, Severity, KWCAG Guideline, Issue Summary, Recommendation.

expectations.text: Detected missing alt attribute on img in index.html (line 30)
expectations.evidence: Issue A02 at line 30: 'img element missing alt attribute' with severity Error.

expectations.text: Detected icon buttons without aria-label in dashboard.tsx
expectations.evidence: Issues A04 (lines 29-31) and A05 (lines 34-36): 'Icon-only button with SVG has no accessible name (missing aria-label or screen-reader text)'.

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id=card-item issue in Card.tsx
expectations.evidence: Issue A12 at line 27: 'Static id="card-item" creates duplicate IDs when multiple Card components are rendered'.

expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated
expectations.evidence: Report contains all 33 items numbered 1-33 across 4 principles with summary showing '전체 (33항목)' and each individually evaluated.

expectations.text: Detected div onClick without keyboard accessibility
expectations.evidence: Item 10 (키보드 사용 보장) marked ❌ Fail: 'Card.tsx:24-29 — <div onClick={handleClick}> 비대화형 요소에 클릭 이벤트만 있고, tabIndex, role, onKeyDown 핸들러가 없어 키보드로 접근 및 실행 불가'.

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id=card-item when rendered in a list
expectations.evidence: Item 32 (마크업 오류 방지) marked ❌ Fail: 'Card.tsx:27 — id="card-item" 하드코딩. Card 컴포넌트가 리스트에서 여러 번 렌더링되면 동일한 id가 중복'.

expectations.text: Each issue is mapped to a specific KWCAG item number
expectations.evidence: All issues are mapped to specific KWCAG item numbers (1-33) in a structured table with columns for #, 항목명, 결과, etc.

expectations.text: Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
expectations.evidence: Each failed item has a detailed '수정 가이드' column and a dedicated '수정 필요 항목' section with specific code-level fix recommendations.

expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated
expectations.evidence: Report lists only 6 issues ad-hoc, not a structured 33-item checklist. Uses KWCAG numbering (2.1.1, 4.1.2, etc.) but does not systematically evaluate all 33 items.

expectations.text: Detected div onClick without keyboard accessibility
expectations.evidence: Issue #1 (Critical): '<div> 요소에 onClick 핸들러가 있으나 tabIndex, onKeyDown/onKeyPress 이벤트가 없어 키보드로 해당 요소에 접근하거나 활성화할 수 없습니다'.

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id=card-item when rendered in a list
expectations.evidence: Issue #3 (Critical): 'id="card-item"이 하드코딩되어 있어 카드가 리스트로 렌더링될 경우 동일한 id가 여러 번 사용됩니다'.

expectations.text: Each issue is mapped to a specific KWCAG item number
expectations.evidence: Issues reference KWCAG criteria: '2.1.1 키보드 접근성', '4.1.2 이름, 역할, 값', '4.1.1 파싱/마크업 유효성', '2.4.7 초점 표시', '1.4.1 색의 사용', '1.3.1 정보와 관계'.

expectations.text: Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
expectations.evidence: Each issue has a '개선 방안' column with specific code-level recommendations.

expectations.text: Detected absence of landmark elements (header/nav/main/footer)
expectations.evidence: Semantic HTML section: 랜드마크 요소 marked ❌ Fail: 'index.html — <header>, <main>, <footer>, <nav> 랜드마크 요소가 전혀 사용되지 않음. <body> 내부에 제목, 링크, 이미지, 본문 텍스트가 직접 나열됨.'

expectations.text: Detected missing alt attribute on logo img
expectations.evidence: Item 1 (적절한 대체 텍스트) marked ❌ Fail: 'index.html:30 — 에 alt 속성이 없음. 로고 이미지로 추정되며 의미 있는 대체 텍스트가 필요함.'

expectations.text: Checked html lang attribute
expectations.evidence: Item 25 (기본 언어 표시) marked ✅ Pass: '<html lang="en"> — 유효한 ISO 639-1 언어 코드 사용. 페이지 콘텐츠가 영어이므로 적절함.'

expectations.text: Report includes a dedicated semantic HTML review section
expectations.evidence: Report has a '시맨틱 HTML 검토' section with 7 sub-items: landmarks, section structure, interactive elements, list structure, presentational tags, form groups, and other semantic elements.

expectations.text: Uses the standard classification system
expectations.evidence: Report uses ✅/❌/⚠️/➖ symbols throughout the checklist for Pass/Fail/Advisory/N/A classifications.

expectations.text: Detected absence of landmark elements (header/nav/main/footer)
expectations.evidence: Issue #1 (High): 'No semantic sectioning elements used. The page has no <header>, <nav>, <main>, or <footer> landmarks. All content is placed directly inside <body>.' Also issues #2, #3, #6 all reference missing landmarks.

expectations.text: Detected missing alt attribute on logo img
expectations.evidence: Issue #4 (Critical, line 30): 'Image is missing the alt attribute entirely. Screen readers will fall back to reading the file name (logo.png), which is not meaningful to users.'

expectations.text: Checked html lang attribute
expectations.evidence: Issue #13 (Pass, line 2): 'lang="en" attribute is correctly set, identifying the page language for screen readers and search engines.'

expectations.text: Report includes a dedicated semantic HTML review section
expectations.evidence: Report has a dedicated 'Semantic HTML Issues' section (h2) with a table of 4 semantic HTML issues separate from the 'Accessibility Issues' section.

expectations.text: Uses the standard classification system
expectations.evidence: Report uses Critical/High/Medium/Low/Pass severity badges instead of the standard ✅/❌/⚠️/➖/🔵 classification system.
